title: Nessa no Haou Gandalla

synonyms: The King of Burning Desert Gandalla
Supreme Ruler of the Hot Sands Gandahara
Gandalla: The King of Burning Desert
Gandalla - Le roi du désert brûlant
synopsis: A dispute between young band members and an unfortunate choice of melody inadverdently draws them all into the demonic horror known as the desert-god Gandalla.

title: Mobile Suit SD Gundam's Counterattack
titleRomaji: Kidou Senshi SD Gundam no Gyakushuu
titleNative: 機動戦士ＳＤガンダムの逆襲
synopsis: There are 2 parts to this... In "The Storm-Calling School Festival", Char and Haman host a festival to celebrate the union between the Nu School for Boys and the Zeta School for Girls. But all hell breaks loose when the Counterattack School gang - led by Amuro, Judau and Kamille - rush in to crash the party. 'The Tale of the SD Warring States: The Chapter of the Violent Final Sky Castle' is the second part of SD Gundam's Counterattack.

title: Tensai Ouji no Akaji Kokka Saisei Jutsu: Short Drama
titleRomaji: Tensai Ouji no Akaji Kokka Saisei Jutsu: Short Drama
titleNative: 天才王子の赤字国家再生術 ショートドラマ
synonyms: The Genius Prince's Guide to Raising a Nation Out of Debt
synopsis: Monthly chibi short dramas written by Tooru Toba featuring the characters of Tensai Ouji no Akaji Kokka Saisei Jutsu in the lead up to the January 2022 premiere of the TV anime. Posted on the NBCUniversal Anime/Music YouTube Channel and later on the Blu-ray release of the series. Includes: • Fest (フェス), released on Aug 11, 2021 • Bunka no Hata ni wa Shoko no Kage (文化の傍には食の影), released on Sep 21, 2021 • Halloween no Cosplay (ハロウィンのコスプレ), released on Oct 30, 2021 • Kinroukansha no Hi (勤労感謝の日), released on Nov 23, 2021 • Santa Claus o Tsukamaete (サンタクロースを捕まえて), released on Dec 23, 2021

title: Dragon Age: Dawn of the Seeker
titleRomaji: Dragon Age: Blood Mage no Seisen
titleEnglish: Dragon Age: Dawn of the Seeker
titleNative: ドラゴンエイジ ブラッドメイジの聖戦
synopsis: In a time of darkness and barbarism, the Chantry has arisen - a religious order seeking to bring stability to a world corrupted by sinister magic. Led by the Divine, the Chantry's Templar warriors ruthlessly restrain the Mages and their magical cabals. But when the Templars fail, the most elite order of the Chantry takes charge - the Seekers! (Source: AniDB)

tags.name: Full CGI
tags.description: Almost entirely created with computer-generated imagery.

title: TWOCAR
titleNative: つうかあ
synopsis: Original anime by Silver Link commemorating their 10th anniversary. Today's the opening day for the high school division of the racing kneeler exhibition! Ladies gather from across the nation, determined to win in the "kneeler race." Today's race is to introduce this season's contestants. No one will be pushing themselves to the limit just yet, but you can expect that at the competition. So begins the female racers' fight for first place! (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Duel Masters
titleNative: デュエル・マスターズ
synopsis: The 1st Duel Masters series. A mysterious organization is interested in fledging duellist Shobu Kirifuda's ability to bring Duel Master creatures to life. With the support of his friends, Shobu duels with passion, discipline, and heart as he strives to be like his father and become the next Kaijudo master. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: CLIMBER
titleNative: CLIMBER
synopsis: There is a stone pillar that continues long and long. Climbers are climbing it. Each climber keeps climbing the stone pillar spending time. They are the symbols of accumulation. Graduate Work 2010 by Nonaka Akifumi, Tokyo University of the Arts, Graduate School of Film and New Media, Department of Animation. Prize: 2010 Digital Creators Competition 2010, Silver blade prize 2010 16th Campus Genius Award, Entertainment prize 2011 Miyagi, Sendai Animation Grand Prix 2011 Students department, Ａward for Excellence 2011 14th CHOFU Short Film Competition, Incentive award 2011 CREATIVE MARKET TOKYO 2011 Award, Jury's special award (Source: Geidai Animation)

tags.name: No Dialogue

title: Pro Golfer Saru (1985)
titleNative: プロゴルファー猿
synopsis: Sarumaru is a wild child who lives in the countryside with his mother and five siblings. He's a self-proclaimed "professional golfer", playing betting golf as an amateur at a nearby golf course using his handmade driver. One day Sarumaru's golf technique is discovered by Mr. X, the shadow leader of the golf world, who tries to bring the boy under his control by sending against him his underlings. This is the story of the fierce battle between Sarumaru and Mr. X's golfers.

tags.name: Golf

title: That is the Bottleneck
titleNative: それだけがネック
synonyms: Ahí está el cuello de botella
synopsis: The employees at the Hot Hot Mart may seem a bit ordinary and mundane. From slightly unproductive chatter and everyone’s obsession with technology, to the laziness of the store manager, is everyone okay...? But everything isn’t as it seems—especially with Muto, the mysterious worker whose face is concealed and is followed by an ominous cat. Get ready to see what happens before the next shift! (Source: Funimation)

title: Taisei Kensetsu: Myanmar
titleNative: 大成建設 CM: ミャンマー
synopsis: A 30-second animated commercial for the construction company Taisei. The commercial highlights the New Yangon Specialist Hospital that Taisei built in Yangon, Myanmar.

title: Face on Lie
titleNative: 谎颜
synopsis: Yuxi who was discriminated against based on her looks goes to a plastic surgery clinic for a consultation, giving into the tempting proposal when Huantao, the handsome director, steps in and tells her, "I'll make you beautiful." Thinking that this was the shortcut to happiness, Yuxi accepts... but will she truly be able to obtain happiness by becoming beautiful?

title: Youkai Watch: Soratobu Kujira to Double Sekai no Daibouken da Nyan!
titleRomaji: Youkai Watch: Soratobu Kujira to Double Sekai no Daibouken da Nyan!
titleNative: 妖怪ウォッチ 空飛ぶクジラとダブル世界の大冒険だニャン!
synopsis: When a giant flying whale suddenly appears over Sakura New Town and its sound is heard the Yo-Kai undergo a transformation. The characters soon realize that as a result they have become corporeal and exist in a material world. This is the third film in the Yok-Kai Watch series based on the hit game.
